channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Actor Justin Baldoni lists $8.9 million Ojai estate as legal battle with Blake Lively continues
item.description: Beleaguered actor Justin Baldoni has quietly listed his sprawling California compound for $8.88 million, months before he is due to go head to head in...

item.title: ‘My mom was very upset’: My stepsister changed the address on our mother’s bank account. Can she be trusted as executor?
item.description: “It’s things like this that make me wonder what else she might be doing.”

item.title: Pinterest shares are sinking. The AI risk is now, one analyst says.
item.description: Pinterest shares are tumbling after a disappointing revenue outlook and quarterly growth, as some analysts can’t shake their AI disruption concerns.

item.title: My elderly mother has dementia. My sister sold her house and has hidden the proceeds. What can we do?
item.description: “My sister is planning to move out of state and feels it is her right to control the money.”

item.title: Why silver prices cratered on a reported Russian proposal to re-dollarize
item.description: Bloomberg reported an unconfirmed package of proposals from Russia offering the U.S. economic partnership in energy and natural resources projects, an...

item.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The S&P 500 posted a third consecutive losing session as concerns over disruption from artificial intelligence weighed down the major averages Thursda...

item.title: Top hyperscalers set to boost 2026 AI spending by 70% to $600 billion. How to play the spending boom now
item.description: Tech investors told CNBC that they were watching 'pick-and-shovel' infrastructure stocks, derivative power plays and semiconductor names.

item.title: With the market rotation underway, agribusiness stocks may be ready for a bounce
item.description: A key theme of 2026 is boring is back. The charts suggest some opportunity in agribusiness stocks.

item.title: This auto supplier just pivoted to AI data centers. Wall Street is really bullish
item.description: BorgWarner’s deal with TurboCell has investors excited about the auto supplier’s potential to adapt to the AI-economy.

item.title: Josh Brown says this homebuilder is forming one of the most bullish chart patterns that exist
item.description: Josh and Sean discuss the appeal of old economy stocks and the cup-and-handle chart pattern.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
